name: 03_cand_1_asia_london_breakout_gold
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) produces directional range expansion when the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) builds a moderate ATR-normalized range; trading the first close beyond that range captures the expansion move with positive expectancy.

entry_rules.long: During london_session, first bar whose close > asia_range_high + 0.25*ATR AND candle body >= 1.0*ATR.
entry_rules.short: During london_session, first bar whose close < asia_range_low - 0.25*ATR AND candle body >= 1.0*ATR.

exit_rules.stop_loss: 0.75 * ATR(14) from entry, placed on opposite side of broken level
exit_rules.time_stop: Close any open trade at 12:00 UTC same day
exit_rules.breakeven: Move SL to entry after +1.0 ATR in favor
